---
title: "geocoding"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidygeocoder)

locations = read_csv("Xerces Site Counts by County.csv", 
              n_max = 387, col_select = c(1:3))

locations$address = paste0(locations$'SITE NAME', ', ', locations$'COUNTY or REGION')

head(locations$address)
```

```{r}
locations = locations %>% geocode(address)
```
